## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] No secrets, real credentials, or real personal data added (anywhere, incl. tests/commits)
- [ ] No new external API calls or dependencies — or I've explained why below
- [ ] Preserves the project's invariants: approval-first, the privacy invariant, and the app still runs fully with `LLM_PROVIDER=none`
